features: 【Stylish & Practical Solar Lanterns】Why compromise between beauty and function? Our elegant solar lanterns for outside combine vintage charm with effective illumination, casting enchanting hummingbird patterns. Perfect as garden ornaments outdoor, patio décor, or balcony accents—ideal for pathways, seasonal displays, or as thoughtful birthday gifts for women and Mothers Day gifts.

【Eco-Friendly Solar Power】These solar lanterns for the garden require no wiring—simply place your outdoor solar lanterns in a sunny spot! The high-efficiency panel makes them energy-saving and environmentally friendly, a perfect sustainable gift for mum who loves her garden.

【Automatic Dusk-to-Dawn Operation】Our solar lanterns for outside automatically turn on at sunset and off at sunrise. Position them in direct sunlight (about 8 hours) for 7-8 hours of warm, ambient glow. (Remember to switch on via the cover toggle before first use!)

【IP44 Waterproof & Durable】Designed to withstand British weather, these durable garden ornaments outdoor feature IP44 waterproof protection—perfect for year-round use. (For indoor décor, simply cover the solar panel to activate.)

【Quick & Easy Setup】Your new solar lanterns for outside are ready in seconds—just flip the switch and place or hang them wherever needed. A fuss-free yet charming gift for mum, garden lovers, or as a unique birthday gift for women.
